productDisplayName: Nike Men French Football Federation Blue Jersey
description: CompositionBlue jersey with a spread collar in contrast colour, front panel made Dri-Fit 96% recycled polyester/4% organic cotton, back panel/collar made of 100% polyester. FitRegular  Wash care Machine was cold Wash separately Do not bleach Line dry Do not iron Get ready to score goals with the 2011/12 French football Federation Official home men's Football shirt from nike. Considered one of the most advanced in nike's lineup, the FFF Official Home Shirt is made with material developed exclusively for the French national team. The recycled cotton-polyester blend has a soft feel on the inside and sweat-wicking properties on the outside to help keep you dry and comfortable.Design details include the team's slogan, "United By Our Differences," placed on the inside of the club badge. The badge features a single star to represent France's world championship triumph in 1998. This sweat-wicking Dri-FIT fabric was made from the equivalent of eight recycled plastic bottles thereby the production of this jersey has minimal environmental impact.
